# Third-party test fixtures

This directory contains a few test images sourced from third-party
collections. They are used only by the test suites in `golang/`, `rust/`,
and `typescript/`.

## CC0 / Public Domain

### exif6-real.jpg

- **Source**: [zpl.fi exif-orientation test images](https://git.zpl.fi/exif-orientation/) — `images/Exif6.jpg`
- **Author**: Tuomas Siipola
- **License**: [CC0 1.0 Universal (Public Domain Dedication)](https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/)
- **Why**: Real-world little-endian EXIF JPEG with `Orientation = 6` (90° CW rotation marker). The synthetic `injectExifOrientation` helper used elsewhere in the tests writes big-endian (`MM`) TIFF, while real cameras almost always use little-endian (`II`). This file exercises the little-endian path of `JpegOrientation` and `NormalizeJpegOrientation`.

## Locally generated

Other JPEG/PNG/GIF fixtures in this directory are either:

- generated by the helper scripts under `scripts/`, e.g. `gen_alpha_png/` and `gen_nonmcu_jpeg/`,
- copied from a system file (e.g. `srgb-test.icc` is a copy of macOS `sRGB Profile.icc`, redistributed for the limited purpose of running tests against a real ICC profile),
- or part of the original modernimage testdata (committed in earlier commits, see git history for provenance).
